title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: frr bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for frr is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: FRRouting is free software that manages TCP/IP based routing protocols. It supports BGP4, OSPFv2, OSPFv3, ISIS, RIP, RIPng, PIM, NHRP, PBR, EIGRP and BFD. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): When rewriting the source address set in FRR route-map sets multiple lo addresses, one of them is not reflected. [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114183)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for frr is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

FRRouting is free software that manages TCP/IP based routing protocols. It supports BGP4, OSPFv2, OSPFv3, ISIS, RIP, RIPng, PIM, NHRP, PBR, EIGRP and BFD. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): When rewriting the source address set in FRR route-map sets multiple lo addresses, one of them is not reflected. [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114183)
